targets.rawSql: WITH last AS (SELECT MAX(created_at) AS max_at FROM scans) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans s LEFT JOIN rules r ON s.rule_id = r.id CROSS JOIN last l WHERE s.created_at >= l.max_at - interval '90 seconds' AND s.error = true AND r.level = 3

WITH last AS (SELECT MAX(created_at) AS max_at FROM scans) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans s LEFT JOIN rules r ON s.rule_id = r.id CROSS JOIN last l WHERE s.created_at >= l.max_at - interval '90 seconds' AND s.error = true AND r.level = 2

WITH last AS (SELECT MAX(created_at) AS max_at FROM scans) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans s LEFT JOIN rules r ON s.rule_id = r.id CROSS JOIN last l WHERE s.created_at >= l.max_at - interval '90 seconds' AND s.error = true AND r.level = 1

WITH last AS (SELECT MAX(created_at) AS max_at FROM scans) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans s LEFT JOIN rules r ON s.rule_id = r.id CROSS JOIN last l WHERE s.created_at >= l.max_at - interval '90 seconds' AND s.error = true AND r.level = 0

SELECT date_trunc('minute', s.created_at) AS time, CASE r.level WHEN 3 THEN 'fatal' WHEN 2 THEN 'error' WHEN 1 THEN 'warning' WHEN 0 THEN 'info' ELSE 'unknown' END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM scans s LEFT JOIN rules r ON s.rule_id = r.id WHERE $__timeFilter(s.created_at) AND s.error = true GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Findings by category (rule prefix, last cycle)

targets.rawSql: WITH last AS (SELECT MAX(created_at) AS max_at FROM scans) SELECT split_part(r.name, '-', 1) AS category, split_part(r.name, '-', 2) AS subcategory, COUNT(*) AS findings FROM scans s LEFT JOIN rules r ON s.rule_id = r.id CROSS JOIN last l WHERE s.created_at >= l.max_at - interval '90 seconds' AND s.error = true GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY findings DESC LIMIT 25

WITH last AS (SELECT MAX(created_at) AS max_at FROM scans), recent AS (SELECT s.target, s.error, r.level FROM scans s LEFT JOIN rules r ON s.rule_id = r.id CROSS JOIN last l WHERE s.created_at >= l.max_at - interval '90 seconds') SELECT target, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE error AND level = 3) AS fatal, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE error AND level = 2) AS error, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE error AND level = 1) AS warning, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT error) AS passed FROM recent GROUP BY target ORDER BY fatal DESC, error DESC
